title: 札幌記念の後に・我ここに在り

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Back in top form, Air Groove secures the victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having overcome her fear of Silence Suzuka, Air
Groove wants to challenge her once more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we set our next target as the fall Tenno
Sho.
